what_it_shows: CEA-Leti/Morpho XDi system module and 22 +/- 1 C operating condition.
role_in_review: Shows why XDi uses near-room-temperature CdZnTe control instead of cooled Ge.

what_it_shows: Autonomous CZT module architecture, detector/ASIC chain and room-temperature module concept.
role_in_review: Supports the module-level engineering route for EDXRD baggage screening.

what_it_shows: Duke/Redlen medium-flux CZT detector layout and thermal/structural isolation idea.
role_in_review: Connects detector temperature sensitivity with coherent scatter system design.

what_it_shows: Fan-beam coded-aperture XRD prototype geometry using an energy-integrating flat panel.
role_in_review: Application benchmark: useful for discussing what CdZnTe/CdTe would need to replace.

what_it_shows: Redlen HF-CdZnTe/HEXITEC 241Am spectrum and FWHM uniformity maps.
role_in_review: Supports near-room-temperature CdZnTe spectral-resolution stability and spatial uniformity.

what_it_shows: HEXITEC MHz calibrated high-gain CSD spectrum at 20 keV with Gaussian fit.
role_in_review: Shows high-flux CdZnTe can retain spectroscopic resolution after calibration.

what_it_shows: Al attenuation protocol and flux-dependent 0-gamma peak-position shift.
role_in_review: Shows that high-flux CdZnTe still needs leakage/baseline correction at high flux.

what_it_shows: PRB model: trapped-hole space charge creates field pinch and changes electron transport.
role_in_review: Mechanistic figure for CdZnTe high-flux polarization.

what_it_shows: Experimental validation of critical flux dependence on bias and temperature.
role_in_review: Supports V^2 dependence and exponential temperature dependence of critical flux.

what_it_shows: Redlen HF-CdZnTe pulse shapes, spectra versus bias, and Hecht charge-collection fit.
role_in_review: Shows bias-dependent charge collection and transport evidence under controlled CdZnTe operation.

what_it_shows: Room-temperature high-flux CdZnTe count response and non-polarizing behavior.
role_in_review: Key evidence for CdZnTe operation at very high photon flux near room temperature.

what_it_shows: 20 C dark-current I-V of optimized Redlen HF-CdZnTe contacts.
role_in_review: Shows contact engineering lowers leakage and enables high bias.

what_it_shows: High-flux stability/hysteresis behavior up to synchrotron-relevant fluxes.
role_in_review: Shows upper flux boundary and residual field-evolution effects.

what_it_shows: Pt/CdTeO3/CZT interface and spectroscopic/contact-performance evidence.
role_in_review: Explains why contact engineering, not only cooling, controls HF-CdZnTe leakage.

what_it_shows: Redlen high-flux CdZnTe signal stability at 0/15/30 C and high flux.
role_in_review: Direct material comparison evidence favoring CdZnTe stability.

what_it_shows: CdTe Schottky continuous-illumination instability and bias-refresh comparison.
role_in_review: Contrasts CdTe transient instability with CdZnTe stability.

what_it_shows: CdTe temperature-dependent barrier lowering and detrapping-time table.
role_in_review: Quantitative support for temperature-controlled CdTe polarization time constants.

what_it_shows: Modified CdTe field-distribution model and 59.5 keV photopeak shift onset.
role_in_review: Links electric-field evolution to peak-position drift.

what_it_shows: Al/p-CdTe/Pt I-V curves as a function of temperature and measurement delay.
role_in_review: Shows CdTe leakage/current data depend on temperature and time after bias.

what_it_shows: Activation energy and polarization time versus temperature.
role_in_review: Supports cooling as a way to increase CdTe polarization time.

what_it_shows: Arrhenius analysis of CdTe Schottky polarization time constants.
role_in_review: Mechanistic support for thermally activated CdTe polarization.

what_it_shows: CdTe Schottky normalized hit maps after 5 h at 0/15/30 C.
role_in_review: Strong visual evidence of CdTe polarization acceleration with temperature.

what_it_shows: CdTe leakage-current increase versus time and temperature.
role_in_review: Shows leakage current as a temperature-dependent stability metric.

what_it_shows: Schottky CdTe Medipix3RX polarization/tri-phase pixel and reset behavior.
role_in_review: Supports the need for bias-reset scheduling and flat-field control.

what_it_shows: Hole-collecting Schottky CdTe persistence after shutter closure and decay time constant from -30 C to +20 C.
role_in_review: Shows cooling can reduce leakage/polarization yet lengthen some delayed-response time scales.

what_it_shows: Electron-collecting CdTe polarization under flood illumination as a function of bias and temperature, with before/after response maps.
role_in_review: Shows lower temperature and higher bias delay CdTe polarization and preserve response uniformity.

what_it_shows: Large-area CdTe DSD reconstructed spectra at -20 C and 500 V, with text reporting <1% energy-resolution change over 20 h.
role_in_review: Example of low-temperature CdTe operation for stable high-resolution spectroscopy.

what_it_shows: CAXI model results showing reconstruction error dependence on CZT detector energy resolution and spectrum tailing.
role_in_review: Connects detector energy-resolution/charge-sharing limits with coded-aperture XRD material-reconstruction quality.

what_it_shows: Spatial maps of X-ray flux, 0-gamma peak-position shift, and dark-corrected spectra in high-flux HEXITEC MHz CdZnTe.
role_in_review: Shows the spatially local nature of excess leakage-current and baseline-shift effects under high flux.

what_it_shows: 20 keV pulsed irradiation of optimized Redlen HF-CdZnTe with flux steps up to 8.1e9 ph mm^-2 s^-1 and R^2 = 0.9999 linearity.
role_in_review: Shows high-flux CdZnTe linearity and stability under controlled 20 C synchrotron irradiation.

what_it_shows: Redlen HF-CdZnTe 12 h stability at 28 C and 18 C: counts, charge sharing, centroid, and FWHM.
role_in_review: Direct evidence for near-room-temperature CdZnTe temporal stability and the modest benefit of 18 C cooling.

what_it_shows: Schottky CdTe/Medipix3RX count loss versus time at 12/18/24 C and at different photon fluxes.
role_in_review: Shows CdTe polarization accelerates with temperature and flux.

what_it_shows: Optimal operational condition charts and bias-reset cycles for Schottky CdTe/Medipix3RX.
role_in_review: Shows the engineering tradeoff between flux, temperature, reset off-time, and stable CdTe operation.
